prestazioni: Engine: TVR Speed Six (AJP8) 4.5L V8 – forged internals upgrade with Cosworth billet crankshaft (86mm stroke), Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (11.5:1 CR), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 800+ hp reliability on VP Racing Q16 fuel.

Forced induction: Custom-built twin-turbo system using Garrett GTX4202R turbos (62mm inducer, 82mm exducer) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, custom TVR-specific cast manifold by Bell Auto Services, and a PWR 4.5-row front-mount intercooler with 3.5" piping and dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB differential (TVR-specific 4.10:1 ratio) paired with a Tilton twin-plate carbon clutch (7.25" diameter) and a TVR Cerbera-specific 6-speed sequential gearbox conversion by Hewland (FT200 ratios: 2.62, 1.80, 1.39, 1.11, 0.91, 0.78) with a Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU.
estetica: Aero: Custom TVR Cerbera widebody kit by Kato Racing (Japan) with carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and a 3-piece adjustable rear wing (Gurney flap included) for 300kg+ downforce at 180mph. Underbody diffuser by APR Performance (TVR-specific mounting points).
Wheels: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 18x10.5" (front) and 18x12" (rear) with custom offsets (+15mm front, +25mm rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear).

Interior: Full carbon fiber dash by V Carbon (TVR-specific mold) with AIM MXS Strada 1.2 dash display, Sparco Pro 2000 seats (TVR-specific mounting brackets), and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, 8-point with door bars) finished in satin black powder coat.
